race.comment: LIBBY ANN (8) has had plenty of chances as a 17-start maiden but is going okay, getting into third when last seen at Mt Gambier. She can figure in a winnable race. STELLETTA (11) resumes. She got over a bit more ground last time in but was thought highly enough to contest a pair of Tasmanian Listed races before a break and this won't take nearly as much winning. CREATIVE RIGHTEOUS (1) resumes for a new yard off a solid jumpout and could surprise. HELLFIRE BAY (4) form since resuming has been poor and he hasn't come close of late. Last time out finished tenth over 1800m at Horsham. CAn feature on best.
